query: Count all buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings in Kristiansand (filter by kommunenummer from step 1)

4.description: reduce stormflohavniva polygons to those intersecting Kristiansand municipality

5.description: find buildings that intersect reduced 200-year storm-flood polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per building (deduplicate) by bygningid

7.description: count distinct buildings that intersect the storm-flood polygons

args.sql:
SELECT
  ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade))::numeric AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade))::numeric AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade))::numeric AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade))::numeric AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna;
